title: The dirac sea zero point energy qabalah and bilocation
display_title: The dirac sea zero point energy qabalah and bilocation
wikitext:
[]: The dirac sea, zero-point energy, qabalah, and bilocation...             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Jul 03, 2006 1:18 pm If anyone has a more advanced knowledge of physics and can help to flesh this out a little more than I can then please do so... If you don’t want to read my brief and simplified explanation of what Dirac thought then go down to the ***** to see the core of what my interpretation is. The Dirac Sea theory was pretty controversial at the time it was formulated because it brought up an old argument in the scientific community about the existence of an aether or astral realm (you know how your science teacher would react if you brought that up). So a lot of scientists at the time found loopholes in the theory and played on them until a lot of what Dirac said was rejected. However, parts of his theory was and still is used as the base of quantumelectrodynamics (it may have a different and more pretentious name by now, I don’t know). Part of what Dirac thought was that the current theories about the universe at the time didn’t make sense because there was no symmetry with forces like electromagnetism, etc. So he figured that there must be a negative energy world to balance our positive one. A easy way to imagine this is if your on a boat in the middle of the ocean and you see a dolphin jump up from the water for the first time. There are two explanations for where the dolphin comes from and where it goes. 1) That the matter that makes the dolphin up is created at the sea’s surface, it exists for a while and then is destroyed as it disappears under the sea’s surface (this is what conventional physics thought). 2) The matter that makes the dolphin up enters into our positive energy world, exists for a while then disappears beneath the sea’s surface into a negative energy world which we can’t see (this is what Dirac thought). If you replace the word ‘dolphin’ with the word ‘electron’ then you understand what Dirac thought. Easy! A person studying physics would probably say, “Whoa, whoa, whoa. You made loads of mistakes with that ‘explanation’ there” but I’m trying to get across the core concepts so it makes sense. ***** There was an episode where Nerv was experimenting with an S² engine/organ in their American branch and when it exploded it left absolutely no trace of the branch at all. Ritsuko thought they had been swallowed up by a dirac sea, so what is the connection between a S² unit and the dirac theory? Mr. Dirac thought that this sea of energy of his would have unlimited energy and would be infinite (which scientists don‘t like an are confused about), and many people have tried to make ‘zero-point’ energy devices to extract energy from this sea of unlimited energy. So what you could say is that the S² unit is the Angel’s power source and is what powers their particle beam weapons as well, so now the connection between the dirac sea and S² is more clear. The dirac sea is like a huge battery and the Angel’s have a way of extracting energy from this battery with their S² units. But maybe using this power in a certain way or using too much of it enables the dirac sea to bridge the gap into our positive energy world (forming a type of portal)? In the Katsuragi expedition scene said something along the lines of, “Dr. Akagi’s super solenoid (S²) theory is the only explanation of that monster’s power.” The above doesn’t really help to make the series’ plot make much more sense, it’s just showing how the Angel’s and EVA-01 are powered and how parts of the puzzle fit together. You don’t need to read this but when it says ‘underlying sea of zero-point energy’ in the following article they are talking about Dirac’s theory in terms of evangelion, just with a different name: http://www.calphysics.org/zpe.html This sea, which is shown in the show as being a limitless space filled with light ties exactly into the void of the universe which qabalah speaks of. It started with Ain (the void of limitless light), Ain became Ain Soph, Ain Soph became Ain Soph Aur; which is kether. At the moment Ain Soph Aur compressed non-destructivly into a point it expanded outwards again emanating all the other sephirah, negative and positive, much like a ripple in a pond; which is what we see at the beginning of each and every episode. HPB talked about the point in the circle being representative in the qabalah as the beginning ripple of consciousness that all forms had risen from. The dirac sea also explains Rei's bilocation as well as the Angels sudden appearance on radar, etc, as the dirac sea is an aether; a place where... Rei wrote: ... everything is everywhere and nowhere, all at once.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Mon Jul 03, 2006 3:55 pm so the s2 organ draws upon the energy in the Dirac sea directly and directs it into what ever the angel or Unit 01 needed. But didn't ritsuko say something about needing a soul to keep an s2 from using up all the mater around it? or that it used mass to make energy? Or have I been reading too many fanfics and confusing them with the series?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 4:29 pm I personally thought the S2 engine was singularity based.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jul 03, 2006 4:45 pm IIRC, the Eva Sage went into quite some depth on a very similar line of reasoning.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 03, 2006 4:48 pm That the S2 organ taps the energy of the quantum vacuum is pretty much a no-brainer. The ZPE is, however, not the same as the Dirac negative energy continuum. Rather it is a consequence of uncertainty. A quantum oscillator cannot have a rest state (zero energy), because it would then have a definite position and momentum, both at the same time. So, however much you try to stop it, it still has an irrecucible minimum of energy (unless it were to tunnel to negative energy, of course).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jul 04, 2006 10:43 am Thanks for posting that Mr. Tines, as I was reading that a bridge formed in my mind between a few concepts... called a mental break in Gasaraki. :o The human bodyâ€™s energy field (the only part we know of being the prana tube down our spines), is our SÂ² drive and what keeps us alive, more often called vortex energy. The torus besides from being one of the best shapes to accelerate particles is one of the best models for consciousness, as it is self referential (all points of the field collapse unto themselves, every point on the torus is connected to every other point, creating self-awareness) and creates a stable vortex of energy which comes from both the top and the bottom of the torus; creating a tube of prana along the spine as is talked about by many yogi! Why does NERV use a pyramid structure? Is it part of a larger system centred around the contents of central dogma to keep their god alive? Doesn't it all relate to vortex energy? The same way as the angels use super solenoid drives. Why does gendo jam his hand into Rei and slowly moves down into her body? Isn't he looking for the vertex of the torus field, which is the life-giving field around us as it facilitates in charge compression from the dirac sea to integrate Adam's consciousness into Lilith's, orâ€¦ sharing the same waves as each other. DNA makes us lilim into the shape we are so we have this field to suck in charge, or prana, to keep us alive. The angels use a actual physical model of the same technology as we have, called the super solenoid, it allows much more compression of energy due to its solidity.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 04, 2006 10:48 am I'm sure Anno-kun hired steven hawking yo make sure he got the physics right.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jul 04, 2006 11:10 am Datdude, this is a neat model for thanatos and libido that ties in with the angelâ€™s technology of SÂ² drives. It doesnâ€™t have much to do with physics as I said above; the yogis knew the same thing on a meta-level. http://www-vis.lbl.gov/Vignettes/KDowning-DNA/ Itâ€™s the same technology as the angelâ€™s use to create self-sustaining recursion, or infinite power. You can use this to explain why the children can resonate with the EVAs when no one else can, Kaworu mentioned how that worked didn't he? He said as long as no dominant soul is inside the EVA he can control it, the same is true for the children so the EVAs become them when synched! All the children have no dominant soul (read, lack of self awareness, recursion in their torus field that keeps them alive, hence they are all suicidal and manifest thanatos because they aren't compressing charge like the angel's do to power them up , especially Rei, whose charge compression is so weak she actually falls apart), this works with what Hebrew texts say of lilith; that all the children borne of her (all those who have weak self-reference/minds, accelerated by the negative thought-forms of second impact) could control demons, like the EVAs, much more easily than man with his technology and armour/restraints.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 04, 2006 11:32 am Them's many fine big words their zuggy but tell me black and white, yes or no. Did Anno work out all the physics of Evangelion ?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jul 04, 2006 12:02 pm No.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Tue Jul 04, 2006 12:38 pm what did Anno miss?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jul 04, 2006 3:56 pm Looks like the post I made here a little while ago didn't make it through, here it is again: ChronoX wrote: what did Anno miss?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 05, 2006 3:08 pm The Dirac Sea Theory

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Jul 06, 2006 8:11 am FauÃŸtin wrote: Electric and magnetic fields are two different things, though they effect each other a lot (maybe interdependent?).

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 06, 2006 8:55 am It's interesting about the attraction/repulsion of magnets and applying that to the social level of being, but wouldn't that mean I would repel all those who held a similar field to me?

[]:             Quote Post by ayanami_the_fifth » Thu Aug 24, 2006 9:17 am the S^2 could just be a limiting field of electromagnetic energy that keeps something inside the core of the organ. that could well be antimatter drawn out from othe dimensions. the organ could be used to control reactions between antimatter and matter, which could produce huge amounts of energy (probably power the angels)... the eva with S^2 organ could have a unstable electromagnetic field that could not control the antimatter reaction and thus eliminated the NERV base... this has little to do with the Dirac's equation but this is a thought that i had...
